positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for vladimir_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    has_us_citizenship(X0) | has_taiwanese_citizenship(X0)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    vladimir != ekaterina).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~has_taiwanese_citizenship(vladimir)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~has_taiwanese_citizenship(X0) | ~has_us_citizenship(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define russian_federation_official(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define can_register_to_vote_us(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define can_participate_2024_election(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define manager_at_gazprom(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for vladimir_negative
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~has_taiwanese_citizenship(X0) | ~has_us_citizenship(X0)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    vladimir != ekaterina).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~has_taiwanese_citizenship(vladimir)).

cnf(u24,negated_conjecture,
    russian_federation_official(vladimir)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    has_us_citizenship(X0) | has_taiwanese_citizenship(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~russian_federation_official(X0) | ~has_taiwanese_citizenship(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define can_register_to_vote_us(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define can_participate_2024_election(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define manager_at_gazprom(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
